name: Abacus Credit Counseling
description_short: Non-profit credit counseling founded by bankruptcy and financial professionals. Provides pre- and post-bankruptcy courses designed to help consumers analyze spending and rebuild financially.
description_long:
Abacus Credit Counseling is a non-profit organization founded in 2007 by a team of bankruptcy attorneys and financial professionals, including CEO Laurie Ahart (attorney and Certified Personal Financial Counselor) and directors with extensive backgrounds in corporate law, nonprofit management, and financial risk management. The organization operates independently with no financial affiliations to banks, credit card companies, or collection agencies, ensuring advice is client-focused rather than profit-driven.

Abacus specializes in providing mandatory credit counseling courses required before and after bankruptcy filing. Their online and phone-based courses help consumers analyze spending patterns, understand debt mechanics, and learn financial planning fundamentals. Courses are designed by financial planning professionals and offered in partnership with Sage Personal Finance. The company explicitly does not offer debt management plans, keeping its scope focused on education and counseling.

The company distinguishes itself through its leadership team's deep expertise in bankruptcy law and finance. Laurie Ahart brings experience from Hogan Lovells LLP; director Henkie Barron specialized in corporate restructuring and Chapter 11 representation at Winston & Strawn; and director Tom Yu brings banking and risk management experience from Zions Bank and Union Bank. This attorney-and-professional foundation differentiates Abacus from typical credit counseling operations.

Abacus is ideal for individuals required to complete bankruptcy education courses or those seeking professional credit counseling without debt settlement pressure. The primary limitation is that detailed pricing, specific course hours, and comprehensive service descriptions are not fully disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact for specifics.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Founded and led by bankruptcy attorneys and financial professionals with credentials from Stanford, UCLA, Michigan, and other top institutions
Certified Personal Financial Counselor (Laurie Ahart) with hundreds of documented free counseling sessions
Non-profit structure ensures no financial incentive to push consumers toward debt management plans or unnecessary services
Explicitly independent—not affiliated with banks, credit card companies, or collection agencies
Offers courses in multiple formats: online and by phone for accessibility
Courses designed specifically for pre- and post-bankruptcy requirements, addressing actual legal mandates
Spanish language support available on website
cons: Website lacks specific course pricing information—requires direct contact for cost details
Course duration and exact hour requirements not clearly stated on main pages
Limited information about success outcomes or consumer testimonials
Service scope is narrow (counseling and courses only)—does not offer debt settlement, consolidation, or management plans
No visible online scheduling or course registration system on website
best_for: Individuals filing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy who need mandatory pre-filing credit counseling
Bankruptcy debtors completing post-discharge financial management course requirements
Consumers seeking objective financial counseling without debt settlement pressure or sales tactics
diagnosis: Abacus is best for bankruptcy filers who need mandatory credit counseling courses from a professional, independent organization run by attorneys and financial experts. The primary caveat is that the website provides limited details on pricing and scheduling—prospective clients must contact the company directly to understand costs and enrollment procedures.
services: Credit counseling sessions with certified counselors
Attorney portal for accessing client handouts and certificates
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
